Agentmemory MCP

Paid remote MCP for persistent AI agent memory, analytics, checkout, and search-readiness.

Website: https://agentmemory.space/
MCP endpoint: https://agentmemory.space/mcp
Server card: https://agentmemory.space/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
Registry name: space.agentmemory/agentmemory-mcp
Auth: Authorization: Bearer <token> after checkout and token claim.
Boundary: read-only fixed tools for AI agent memory; no arbitrary shell, arbitrary SQL, deployment, deletion, or payment configuration tools.
